case_title: FABIOLA ADDAMO VS. TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-20-2015 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-24-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-20-2015 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PARTIES HAVE REACHED AN SETTLEMENT PRIOR TO THE HEARING. DEFENDANT DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS CASE AT TODAYS HEARING. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JACKY LOPEZ--CORPORATE LEGAL MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,139.24 FILED BY ADDAMO, FABIOLA AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-24-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-04-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
